nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1881; const int b = 2090; const int c = 2145; const int d = 2186; const int e = 2219; const int f = 2248; const int g = 2275; const int h = 2301; const int i = 2326; const int j = 2351; const int k = 2376; const int l = 2401; const int m = 2428; const int n = 2458; const int o = 2491; const int p = 2532; const int q = 2587; const int r = 2796;
